title: Toasty's Jazzy Jukeboxes
description: Remodel's the jukebox to look like Gramaphones
body:
Remodel's the jukebox to look like Gramaphones

This was inspired by [ Old Jukebox by Tar Tary on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/old-jukebox-optifine)

Modeled and textured by me in blockbench

No optifine required
